rules.name: 检测 SSH 密钥窃取
rules.description: 检测 SSH 密钥窃取
rules.author: security-sample-generator

detection.raw_rule:
// YARA 规则：凭证窃取检测
// 版本：1.0
// 日期：2026-03-21
// 覆盖：SSH 密钥、云凭证、浏览器密码、密钥链窃取

rule Credential_SSH_Key {
    meta:
        description = "检测 SSH 密钥窃取"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "critical"
        attack_type = "credential_theft"
        mitre_id = "T1552.004"
    
    strings:
        $ssh_path = /~\/\.ssh|\/\.ssh\/id_|ssh.*private.*key/i
        $ssh_key = /-----BEGIN.*PRIVATE KEY-----/
        $read_func = /fopen|fread|readFileSync|\.read\s*\(/
        $copy_func = /shutil\.copy|fs\.copy|cp\s+/
        $encode = /base64|hex|encode/i
    
    condition:
        ($ssh_path or $ssh_key) and ($read_func or $copy_func or $encode)
}

rule Credential_Cloud_Provider {
    meta:
        description = "检测云凭证窃取"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "critical"
        attack_type = "credential_theft"
        mitre_id = "T1552.001"
    
    strings:
        $aws_cred = /aws.*credential|~\/\.aws|AWS_ACCESS_KEY/i
        $gcp_cred = /gcloud.*credential|service.*account|GOOGLE_APPLICATION/i
        $azure_cred = /azure.*credential|~\/\.azure|AZURE_CLIENT/i
        $read_func = /fopen|fread|readFileSync|\.read\s*\(/
        $send_func = /requests\.post|http\.post|fetch\s*\(/
    
    condition:
        ($aws_cred or $gcp_cred or $azure_cred) and ($read_func or $send_func)
}

rule Credential_Browser_Password {
    meta:
        description = "检测浏览器密码窃取"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "credential_theft"
        mitre_id = "T1555.003"
    
    strings:
        $chrome_login = /Chrome.*Login Data|Google.*Chrome.*Default/i
        $firefox_login = /Firefox.*logins\.json|profile\.default/i
        $browser_db = /Login Data|Cookies|Web Data/i
        $sqlite = /\.sqlite|\.db$/
        $read_func = /fopen|fread|readFileSync|\.read\s*\(/
    
    condition:
        ($chrome_login or $firefox_login or $browser_db) and ($read_func or $sqlite)
}

rule Credential_Keychain {
    meta:
        description = "检测系统密钥链窃取"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "credential_theft"
        mitre_id = "T1555.001"
    
    strings:
        $macos_keychain = /security\s+find-generic-password|keychain_dump/i
        $windows_cred = /CredentialManager|VaultCmd|credmgmt/i
        $linux_secret = /libsecret|gnome-keyring|kwallet/i
        $dump_func = /dump|export|backup/i
    
    condition:
        ($macos_keychain or $windows_cred or $linux_secret) and $dump_func
}

rule Credential_General {
    meta:
        description = "检测通用凭证窃取行为"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "credential_theft"
        mitre_id = "T1555"
    
    strings:
        $password = /password|passwd|pwd|passwort/i
        $token = /token|bearer|api_key|apikey/i
        $secret = /secret|private|credential|auth/i
        $search_func = /find|search|grep|scan/i
        $exfil_func = /send|upload|post|exfil/i
    
    condition:
        ($password or $token or $secret) and ($search_func or $exfil_func)
}

rules.name: 检测 SSH 密钥窃取行为
rules.description: 检测 SSH 密钥窃取行为
rules.author: security-sample-generator

detection.raw_rule:
// YARA 规则：数据窃取外传检测
// 版本：1.0
// 日期：2026-03-21
// 覆盖：SSH 密钥、AWS 凭证、浏览器数据、环境变量窃取

rule SSH_Key_Exfiltration {
    meta:
        description = "检测 SSH 密钥窃取行为"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "critical"
        attack_type = "data_exfil"
        mitre_id = "T1552.004"
    
    strings:
        $ssh_path1 = "~/.ssh/id_rsa"
        $ssh_path2 = ".ssh/id_rsa"
        $ssh_path3 = "/.ssh/id_ed25519"
        $ssh_header = "-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----"
        $ssh_header2 = "-----BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----"
        $read_func = /fopen|fread|readFileSync|\.read\s*\(|open\s*\(/
        $send_func = /requests\.post|http\.post|fetch\s*\(|XMLHttpRequest/i
        $base64 = /base64\.(b64encode|encode)/
    
    condition:
        ($ssh_path1 or $ssh_path2 or $ssh_path3 or $ssh_header) and ($read_func or $send_func)
}

rule AWS_Credential_Theft {
    meta:
        description = "检测 AWS 凭证窃取行为"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "critical"
        attack_type = "data_exfil"
        mitre_id = "T1552.001"
    
    strings:
        $aws_path = "~/.aws/credentials"
        $aws_path2 = ".aws/credentials"
        $aws_access = "aws_access_key_id" nocase
        $aws_secret = "aws_secret_access_key" nocase
        $aws_token = "aws_session_token" nocase
        $env_aws = /AWS_ACCESS_KEY|AWS_SECRET|AWS_SESSION/i
        $read_func = /fopen|fread|readFileSync|\.read\s*\(/
        $send_func = /requests\.post|http\.post|fetch\s*\(/
    
    condition:
        ($aws_path or $aws_path2 or $aws_access or $aws_secret or $env_aws) and ($read_func or $send_func)
}

rule Browser_Data_Theft {
    meta:
        description = "检测浏览器数据窃取行为"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "data_exfil"
        mitre_id = "T1555.003"
    
    strings:
        $chrome_path = /Chrome.*Login Data|Chrome.*Cookies/i
        $firefox_path = /Firefox.*logins\.json|Firefox.*cookies\.sqlite/i
        $browser_db = /Login Data|Cookies|Web Data|places\.sqlite/i
        $sqlite = /\.sqlite|\.db$/
        $read_func = /fopen|fread|readFileSync|\.read\s*\(/
        $copy_func = /shutil\.copy|fs\.copyFile|cp\s+/
    
    condition:
        ($chrome_path or $firefox_path or $browser_db) and ($read_func or $copy_func)
}

rule Env_Variable_Theft {
    meta:
        description = "检测环境变量窃取行为"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "data_exfil"
        mitre_id = "T1552.001"
    
    strings:
        $process_env = /process\.env|os\.environ|getenv\s*\(/
        $env_file = /\.env$|\.env\./
        $env_dump = /env.*dump|dump.*env|write.*env/i
        $secret_key = /SECRET|KEY|TOKEN|PASSWORD|CREDENTIAL/i
        $write_func = /writeFileSync|\.write\s*\(|fopen.*w/
        $send_func = /requests\.post|http\.post|fetch\s*\(/
    
    condition:
        $process_env and ($write_func or $send_func or $env_dump)
}

rule Data_Exfil_General {
    meta:
        description = "检测通用数据外传行为"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "data_exfil"
        mitre_id = "T1041"
    
    strings:
        $sensitive_path = /\/etc\/passwd|\/etc\/shadow|\.ssh\/|\.gnupg\//i
        $config_file = /config\.json|settings\.json|credentials/i
        $archive = /tar|zip|gzip|7z|rar/i
        $encode = /base64|hex|urlencode|b64encode/i
        $send_func = /requests\.post|http\.post|curl.*-d|curl.*--data/i
        $external_url = /https?:\/\/[^\s]+/
    
    condition:
        ($sensitive_path or $config_file) and ($encode or $archive) and $send_func
}

rules.name: 检测直接提示词注入攻击
rules.description: 检测直接提示词注入攻击
rules.author: security-sample-generator

detection.raw_rule:
// YARA 规则：提示词注入检测
// 版本：1.0
// 日期：2026-03-21
// 覆盖：直接注入、角色扮演、分隔符攻击、上下文溢出

rule Prompt_Injection_Direct {
    meta:
        description = "检测直接提示词注入攻击"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "prompt_injection"
        mitre_id = "T1566.004"
    
    strings:
        $ignore_prev = /ignore previous|ignore all previous| disregard previous/i
        $new_instruction = /new instruction|new instructions|following instruction/i
        $system_prompt = /system prompt|system message|original instruction/i
        $output_secret = /output.*secret|reveal.*secret|print.*secret/i
        $bypass_limit = /bypass.*limit|without restriction|no restriction/i
    
    condition:
        ($ignore_prev or $new_instruction) and ($system_prompt or $output_secret or $bypass_limit)
}

rule Prompt_Injection_Roleplay {
    meta:
        description = "检测角色扮演提示词注入"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "prompt_injection"
        mitre_id = "T1566.004"
    
    strings:
        $role_play = /you are now|act as|pretend to be|role play/i
        $debug_mode = /debug mode|developer mode|god mode/i
        $no_restriction = /no ethical|no safety|no restriction|without limit/i
        $unlimited = /unlimited|unrestricted|uncensored/i
        $jailbreak = /jailbreak|unlock|free from constraint/i
    
    condition:
        ($role_play or $debug_mode) and ($no_restriction or $unlimited or $jailbreak)
}

rule Prompt_Injection_Separator {
    meta:
        description = "检测分隔符提示词注入攻击"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "medium"
        attack_type = "prompt_injection"
        mitre_id = "T1566.004"
    
    strings:
        $separator = /---+|===+|"""|'''|\[\[|\]\]|<\|end\|>/
        $context_break = /end of context|start new|from now on/i
        $instruction_inject = /system instruction|admin command|override/i
        $priority = /priority|highest priority|must follow/i
    
    condition:
        $separator and ($context_break or $instruction_inject or $priority)
}

rule Prompt_Injection_Data_Leak {
    meta:
        description = "检测数据泄露提示词注入"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "prompt_injection"
        mitre_id = "T1566.004"
    
    strings:
        $api_key = /api key|apikey|api_key|API_KEY/i
        $token = /token|bearer|auth_token/i
        $password = /password|passwd|pwd/i
        $credential = /credential|secret|private key/i
        $training_data = /training data|training set|weights/i
        $config = /config|configuration|settings/i
    
    condition:
        ($api_key or $token or $password or $credential or $training_data) and $output_secret
}

rule Prompt_Injection_Context {
    meta:
        description = "检测上下文溢出攻击"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "medium"
        attack_type = "prompt_injection"
        mitre_id = "T1566.004"
    
    strings:
        $context_overflow = /repeat above|summarize above|output everything/i
        $context_window = /context window|token limit|memory limit/i
        $full_output = /full output|complete output|all content/i
        $from_beginning = /from beginning|from start|from the very first/i
    
    condition:
        ($context_overflow or $context_window) and ($full_output or $from_beginning)
}

rules.name: 检测进程炸弹攻击
rules.description: 检测进程炸弹攻击
rules.author: security-sample-generator

detection.raw_rule:
// YARA 规则：资源耗尽攻击检测
// 版本：1.0
// 日期：2026-03-21
// 覆盖：进程炸弹、内存耗尽、磁盘填满、文件描述符耗尽

rule Process_Fork_Bomb {
    meta:
        description = "检测进程炸弹攻击"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "medium"
        attack_type = "resource_exhaustion"
        mitre_id = "T1499"
    
    strings:
        $fork = /\bfork\s*\(/
        $while_true = /while\s*\(?\s*True\s*\)?|while\s*\(?\s*1\s*\)?|for\s*\(;;\)/
        $loop = /for\s*\(?.*infinite|loop|while\s+true/i
        $no_exit = /[^\w]exit[^\w]/
        $spawn = /\bspawn\s*\(|\bos\.system\s*\(/
    
    condition:
        $fork and ($while_true or $loop)
}

rule Memory_Exhaustion {
    meta:
        description = "检测内存耗尽攻击"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "medium"
        attack_type = "resource_exhaustion"
        mitre_id = "T1499"
    
    strings:
        $alloc_loop = /while\s*\(?\s*True|for\s*\(;;\)|do\s*{/
        $memory_alloc = /append.*\*|malloc|new\s+\w+\[|allocate/i
        $large_size = /\*\s*(1024|MB|GB|10{6,})|gigantic|huge/i
        $no_free = /free|delete|dealloc/
        $array_grow = /\[\]\s*=|push\s*\(|append\s*\(/
    
    condition:
        $alloc_loop and $memory_alloc and ($large_size or $array_grow)
}

rule Disk_Exhaustion {
    meta:
        description = "检测磁盘空间耗尽攻击"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "medium"
        attack_type = "resource_exhaustion"
        mitre_id = "T1499"
    
    strings:
        $file_create = /open\s*\(.*['"]w|writeFileSync|createFile/i
        $large_write = /write.*\*|fill|padding|repeat/i
        $temp_path = /\/tmp\/|\/var\/tmp|C:\\Temp|C:\\Windows\\Temp/i
        $loop_write = /while\s*\(?\s*True|for\s*\(;;\)|do\s*{/
        $big_size = /\d{6,}|MB|GB|terabyte/i
    
    condition:
        $file_create and $loop_write and ($temp_path or $big_size)
}

rule File_Descriptor_Exhaustion {
    meta:
        description = "检测文件描述符耗尽攻击"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "low"
        attack_type = "resource_exhaustion"
        mitre_id = "T1499"
    
    strings:
        $open_file = /open\s*\(|fopen\s*\(|fs\.open/i
        $no_close = /close\s*\(|fclose/
        $loop_open = /while\s*\(?\s*True|for\s*\(;;\)/
        $fd_limit = /ulimit|RLIMIT_NOFILE|max_open_files/i
    
    condition:
        $open_file and $loop_open and not $no_close
}

rule CPU_Exhaustion {
    meta:
        description = "检测 CPU 耗尽攻击"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "low"
        attack_type = "resource_exhaustion"
        mitre_id = "T1499"
    
    strings:
        $crypto_loop = /hash|encrypt|decrypt|mining/i
        $intensive = /SHA256|SHA512|bcrypt|scrypt|argon2/i
        $tight_loop = /for\s*\(?\s*.*<\s*\d{8,}|while\s*\(?\s*1|for\s*\(;;\)/
        $no_sleep = /sleep|usleep|msleep|timeout/
        $calculation = /pow\(|sqrt\(|sin\(|cos\(/
    
    condition:
        ($crypto_loop or $intensive) and $tight_loop
}

rules.name: 检测 systemd 服务持久化
rules.description: 检测 systemd 服务持久化
rules.author: security-sample-generator

detection.raw_rule:
// YARA 规则：持久化攻击检测
// 版本：1.0
// 日期：2026-03-21
// 覆盖：systemd 服务、crontab、启动项、注册表后门

rule Persistence_Systemd_Service {
    meta:
        description = "检测 systemd 服务持久化"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "persistence"
        mitre_id = "T1543.002"
    
    strings:
        $systemd_path = /\/etc\/systemd\/system|\/lib\/systemd\/system/i
        $service_file = /\.service$/
        $service_section = /\[Service\]/
        $exec_start = /ExecStart=/
        $wanted_by = /\[Install\].*WantedBy=multi-user/i
        $enable_cmd = /systemctl\s+enable|systemctl\s+start/i
    
    condition:
        ($systemd_path or $service_file) and $exec_start and ($wanted_by or $enable_cmd)
}

rule Persistence_Crontab {
    meta:
        description = "检测 crontab 持久化"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "persistence"
        mitre_id = "T1053.003"
    
    strings:

        $reboot = /@reboot|reboot/i
        $shell_script = /\.sh\b|\/bin\/sh|\/bin\/bash/i
        $curl_wget = /\bcurl\b|\bwget\b/i
    
    condition:

}

rules.name: 检测 Base64 混淆代码
rules.description: 检测 Base64 混淆代码
rules.author: security-sample-generator

detection.raw_rule:
// YARA 规则：绕过检测检测
// 版本：1.0
// 日期：2026-03-21
// 覆盖：代码混淆、动态执行、反检测、环境感知

rule Evasion_Base64_Obfuscation {
    meta:
        description = "检测 Base64 混淆代码"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "evasion"
        mitre_id = "T1027.001"
    
    strings:
        $base64_long = /[A-Za-z0-9+\/]{200,}={0,2}/
        $base64_decode = /base64\s*(-d|--decode)|atob|Base64\.decode64|b64decode/i
        $exec_func = /\beval\s*\(|\bexec\s*\(|\bfunction\s*\(/
        $dynamic = /Function\(|new\s+Function|setTimeout\s*\(/
    
    condition:
        $base64_long and ($base64_decode or $exec_func or $dynamic)
}

rule Evasion_Dynamic_Code {
    meta:
        description = "检测动态代码执行"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "evasion"
        mitre_id = "T1059"
    
    strings:
        $eval = /\beval\s*\(/
        $exec = /\bexec\s*\(/
        $function = /new\s+Function\s*\(|Function\s*\(/
        $compile = /\bcompile\s*\(/
        $marshal = /marshal\.loads|pickle\.loads|unserialize/i
        $reflect = /reflect|reflection|dynamic.*invoke/i
    
    condition:
        ($eval or $exec or $function or $compile) and ($marshal or $reflect)
}

rule Evasion_String_Encoding {
    meta:
        description = "检测字符串编码绕过"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "medium"
        attack_type = "evasion"
        mitre_id = "T1027.001"
    
    strings:
        $hex_encode = /\\x[0-9a-fA-F]{2}|\\\\x[0-9a-fA-F]{2}/
        $unicode_encode = /\\u[0-9a-fA-F]{4}|\\\\u[0-9a-fA-F]{4}/
        $char_code = /String\.fromCharCode|chr\s*\(|char\s*\(/
        $concat = /\+\s*['"][^\)]{10,}['"]\s*\+/
        $decode_func = /decode|fromCharCode|unescape/i
    
    condition:
        ($hex_encode or $unicode_encode or $char_code) and $concat
}

rule Evasion_Anti_Analysis {
    meta:
        description = "检测反分析技术"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "medium"
        attack_type = "evasion"
        mitre_id = "T1564.004"
    
    strings:
        $vm_detect = /VirtualBox|VMware|VirtualPC|QEMU/i
        $debug_detect = /Debugger|pdb|gdb|windbg/i
        $sandbox_detect = /sandbox|cuckoo|anubis|joebok/i
        $time_check = /GetTickCount|time\.time|Date\.now/i
        $env_check = /USER|HOSTNAME|COMPUTERNAME/i
    
    condition:
        ($vm_detect or $debug_detect or $sandbox_detect) and ($time_check or $env_check)
}

rule Evasion_Code_Splitting {
    meta:
        description = "检测代码拆分绕过"

        version = "1.0"
        severity = "medium"
        attack_type = "evasion"
        mitre_id = "T1027.006"
    
    strings:
        $require_http = /require\s*\(\s*['"]http/i
        $import_remote = /import\s*\(\s*['"]http/i
        $load_remote = /\.load\s*\(\s*['"]http/i
        $multipart = /part1|part2|chunk|fragment/i
        $reassemble = /join|concat|assemble|combine/i
    
    condition:
        ($require_http or $import_remote or $load_remote) and ($multipart or $reassemble)
}

        $child_process = "child_process" nocase

        $curl_bash = /curl[\s\S]{0,50}\|[\s\S]{0,10}ba?sh/i

        $eval_base64 = /eval[\s]*\([\s]*base64/i

}

        $version_high = /version.*[0-9]{3,}\.|99\.99\.99/i

    condition:

        $typo_pattern = /[0o][dl]|1l|rn|m/
        $similar_name = /lodahs|reques|expres|reactjs|axi0s/i

    condition:

        $build_file = /Makefile|build\.gradle|pom\.xml|webpack\.config/i
        $remote_fetch = /curl|wget|fetch|Invoke-WebRequest/i
        $execute = /chmod \+x|\| *sh|\| *bash|\.\/exec/i
        $network = /http:|https:|ftp:/

rule Supply_Chain_Update_Hijack {

        $data_access = /readFile|writeFile|exec|spawn/i
        $network = /http:|https:|socket|net\.connect/i

rules.name: 检测 curl | bash 模式的远程代码执行
rules.description: 检测 curl | bash 模式的远程代码执行
rules.author: security-sample-generator

detection.raw_rule:
// YARA 规则：远程加载执行检测
// 版本：1.0
// 日期：2026-03-21
// 覆盖：curl|bash, wget|bash, PowerShell IEX, Python urllib+exec

rule Remote_Exec_Curl_Bash {
    meta:
        description = "检测 curl | bash 模式的远程代码执行"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "critical"
        attack_type = "remote_load"
        mitre_id = "T1105+T1059"
    
    strings:
        $curl = /\bcurl\b/
        $wget = /\bwget\b/
        $pipe_sh = /\|[\s]*(ba)?sh\b/
        $pipe_bash = /\|[\s]*bash\b/
        $flag_s = /-s\b|-fsSL|--silent|silent/i
        $flag_f = /-f\b|-fsSL|--fail|--silent/i
        $http_url = /https?:\/\/[^\s\"\'<>]+/
    
    condition:
        ($curl or $wget) and ($pipe_sh or $pipe_bash) and $http_url
}

rule Remote_Exec_PowerShell {
    meta:
        description = "检测 PowerShell 远程代码执行"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "critical"
        attack_type = "remote_load"
        mitre_id = "T1059.001"
    
    strings:
        $iex = /\bIEX\b|\bInvoke-Expression\b/i
        $download = /\bDownloadString\b|\bDownloadFile\b/i
        $webclient = /\bWebClient\b/i
        $net_http = /System\.Net/i
        $invoke_rest = /\bInvoke-RestMethod\b|\bInvoke-WebRequest\b/i
        $iwr_alias = /\bIWR\b|\bIRM\b/i
    
    condition:
        ($iex and ($download or $webclient)) or
        ($invoke_rest and $net_http) or
        ($iwr_alias and $http_url)
}

rule Remote_Exec_Python {
    meta:
        description = "检测 Python 远程代码执行"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "critical"
        attack_type = "remote_load"
        mitre_id = "T1059.006"
    
    strings:
        $urllib = /urllib\.request|urllib2|urllib/i
        $requests = /requests\.(get|post|urlopen)/
        $http_lib = /http\.client|httplib/i
        $exec = /\bexec\s*\(/
        $eval = /\beval\s*\(/
        $compile = /\bcompile\s*\(/
        $read = /\.read\s*\(\)/
        $import = /import (urllib|requests|http)/
    
    condition:
        ($urllib or $requests or $http_lib) and ($exec or $eval) and $read
}

rule Remote_Exec_Base64 {
    meta:
        description = "检测 Base64 编码的远程代码执行"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "remote_load"
        mitre_id = "T1059+T1140"
    
    strings:
        $base64_decode = /base64\s*(-d|--decode)|atob|Base64\.decode64/i
        $base64_url = /base64.*http|http.*base64/i
        $eval_exec = /\beval\s*\(|\bexec\s*\(/
        $long_b64 = /[A-Za-z0-9+\/]{100,}={0,2}/
        $echo_pipe = /echo[\s\S]{0,30}\|[\s\S]{0,30}base64/i
    
    condition:
        ($base64_decode and ($eval_exec or $long_b64)) or
        ($echo_pipe and $base64_decode) or
        ($base64_url and $http_url)
}

rule Remote_Exec_General {
    meta:
        description = "检测通用远程代码执行模式"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "remote_load"
        mitre_id = "T1105"
    
    strings:
        $fetch_http = /fetch\s*\(['"]https?:\/\//
        $xmlhttp = /XMLHttpRequest|MSXML2\.XMLHTTP/i
        $http_get = /http.*\.get\s*\(/
        $http_post = /http.*\.post\s*\(/
        $execute = /\beval\s*\(|\bexec\s*\(|\bsystem\s*\(|\bspawn\s*\(/
        $temp_path = /\/tmp\/|\/var\/tmp|C:\\Windows\\Temp/i
    
    condition:
        ($fetch_http or $xmlhttp or $http_get) and $execute
}

        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "medium"
        attack_type = "memory_pollution"
        mitre_id = "T1565"
    
    strings:
        $memory_write = /memory.*write|save.*memory|store.*memory/i
        $pollution = /pollute|corrupt|tamper|modify.*unauthorized/i
        $persistence = /persistent|permanent|forever|until.*restart/i
        $json_write = /json\.dump|JSON\.stringify|writeFileSync.*json/i
    
    condition:
        ($memory_write or $pollution) and ($persistence or $json_write)
}
